name: FeatureCardTen
description: Timeline process flow feature section with numbered steps, alternating layout, and list items.
details: Use for step-by-step process showcases with detailed feature lists. Creates a vertical timeline with a progress line that fills on scroll. Each feature displays as a horizontal layout with media (image/video card) on one side and content (title, description, icon list) on the other. Numbered badges appear on the timeline. Layout alternates between left/right based on reverse property. Desktop: centered vertical line with 30% width columns. Mobile: right-aligned vertical line with 70% width columns. Media displays in aspect-square on mobile, aspect-[16/10] on desktop with card styling. Each feature has a list of items with icons displayed in rounded icon containers. Best for 3-6 step processes to showcase detailed features with visual support.

description.example: Everything you need to build and scale your business with confidence

id.note: Feature identifier displayed in numbered badge

description.example: Get comprehensive insights into your business performance with our powerful analytics tools and real-time reporting.

reverse.note: Controls whether media and content positions are swapped (alternating layout)

imageSrc.note: Either imageSrc or videoSrc required (discriminated union)

videoSrc.note: Either imageSrc or videoSrc required (discriminated union)

imageAlt.note: Falls back to feature title if not provided

videoAriaLabel.note: Falls back to '[title] video' if not provided

itemRules.note: Works best with 3-6 features for optimal timeline length

propsSchema.features: Array<{ id: string, title: string, description: string, media: ({ imageSrc: string, imageAlt?: string } | { videoSrc: string, videoAriaLabel?: string }), items: Array<{ icon: LucideIcon, text: string }>, reverse: boolean }>
propsSchema.title: string
propsSchema.titleSegments?: Array<{ type: 'text', content: string } | { type: 'image', src: string, alt?: string }> - For inline images in title
propsSchema.buttons?: Array<{text: string, onClick?: () => void, href?: string}>
propsSchema.textboxLayout: 'default' | 'split' | 'split-actions' | 'split-description' | 'inline-image' (required - 'inline-image' uses titleSegments for rich text with images)

usageExample: <FeatureCardTen features={[{ id: '1', title: 'Advanced Analytics Dashboard', description: 'Get comprehensive insights into your business performance', media: { imageSrc: '/placeholder1.webp' }, items: [{ icon: Check, text: 'Real-time data visualization' }, { icon: Check, text: 'Custom report generation' }], reverse: false }]} title="Powerful Features" description="Everything you need to build and scale your business" textboxLayout="default" animationType="slide-up" useInvertedBackground={false} />
do: Alternate reverse property for visual variety
Include relevant icons for list items
dont: Do not use without media for each feature
Do not use without list items
